canonical_definition: Benchmark suite assessing model performance across six tasks: BBH, GPQA, IFEval, MATH-Hard, MMLU-Pro, and MUSR, covering reasoning, knowledge, and instruction-following abilities using accuracy-based metrics.
papers: Predicting Through Generation: Why Generation Is Better for Prediction

definitions.text: Benchmark suite assessing model performance across six tasks: BBH, GPQA, IFEval, MATH-Hard, MMLU-Pro, and MUSR, covering reasoning, knowledge, and instruction-following abilities using accuracy-based metrics.

More challenging version of the Open LLM Leaderboard that includes expert knowledge benchmarks (MMLU-Pro, GPQA, Big Bench Hard), multi-step reasoning (MuSR), advanced math (MATH Level 5), and instruction following (IFEval), with scores normalized to a 0–100 scale.
definitions.paper: Predicting Through Generation: Why Generation Is Better for Prediction

relationships.paper: xLSTM 7B: A Recurrent LLM for Fast and Efficient Inference
